tasks.title: Implement config.py
tasks.description: All constants: node positions, UWB parameters, pixel grid, parameter ranges (RSS difference model)

tasks.title: Implement forward_model.py — weight matrix W
tasks.description: Inverse Area Elliptical Model, compute W (16x900) with beta bounds and Fresnel zone

tasks.title: Implement forward_model.py — Tikhonov matrix Pi
tasks.description: Pi = (W^T W + alpha*I)^{-1} * W^T, verify dimensions (900x16)

tasks.title: Implement forward_model.py — RSS difference generation
tasks.description: delta_R = c*W*delta_f_A + epsilon, with noise sampling

tasks.title: Validation: RSS difference vs object attenuation
tasks.description: 1 TX, 1 RX, object at midpoint, vary attenuation 0.1-1.0. Verify linear relationship.
tasks.verification_criteria: RSS difference increases linearly with attenuation (R > 0.999)

tasks.title: Validation: RSS difference during human crossing
tasks.description: Person (0.4m x 0.4m, delta_f=0.7) crosses LOS at midpoint. Verify peak at LOS.
tasks.verification_criteria: RSS difference peaks when person crosses LOS, max near x=0

tasks.title: Visualize weight matrix W
tasks.description: Reshape weight vectors to 30x30 for representative links, verify elliptical shape

tasks.title: Visualize Tikhonov reconstruction
tasks.description: Apply Pi to synthetic RSS difference for sample inputs, verify spatial prior quality

tasks.title: Implement SLF change target generation
tasks.description: 10 target types: person, table, chair, cabinet, wall, L/T-shaped, circular, multiple, empty

tasks.title: Implement spatially correlated noise
tasks.description: Gaussian noise with covariance Sigma_f(k,l) = sigma_f^2 * exp(-D_kl/kappa)

tasks.title: Implement full data pipeline
tasks.description: Generate 60,000 samples (48k/6k/6k split), save as dataset with delta_r and delta_f_star keys

tasks.title: Verify data quality
tasks.description: Visualize sample SLFs, RSS difference distributions, check for anomalies

tasks.title: Implement Tikhonov branch
tasks.description: Fixed Pi*delta_r, registered as buffer, no learnable params

tasks.title: Implement FC branch
tasks.description: FC(16->900), init W_fc=Pi, linear (no activation)

tasks.title: Implement U-Net
tasks.description: 2-level encoder, bottleneck, decoder with skip connections. Handle 30->15->7 size mismatch

tasks.title: Implement Dual-Branch U-Net (proposed)
tasks.description: Concat Tikhonov + FC -> 2ch -> U-Net -> 1ch output

tasks.title: Implement ablation models
tasks.description: Tikhonov-Only + U-Net (1ch input), FC-Only + U-Net (1ch input)

tasks.title: Verify model architectures
tasks.description: Forward pass with dummy data, check output shapes, param counts

tasks.title: Implement training loop
tasks.description: Weighted MSE + lambda*(1-SSIM) loss, Adam, ReduceLROnPlateau, early stopping

tasks.title: Train proposed model
tasks.description: End-to-end: Pi frozen, FC + U-Net trained. Log to experiments/

tasks.title: Train Tikhonov-Only ablation
tasks.description: Same config, same data split. Pi frozen, U-Net only trained

tasks.title: Train FC-Only ablation
tasks.description: Same config, same data split. FC + U-Net trained

tasks.title: Evaluate all models on test set
tasks.description: Compute MSE, PSNR, SSIM, RMSE for all 3 models on same test set

tasks.title: Cross-model comparison
tasks.description: Quantitative table + statistical analysis of component contributions

tasks.title: Training curves
tasks.description: Loss vs epoch for all 3 models

tasks.title: Reconstruction comparison grid
tasks.description: Ground truth, Tikhonov-Only, FC-Only, Proposed side-by-side

tasks.title: Error maps and branch analysis
tasks.description: |predicted - ground truth| for each method + Branch A/B intermediate outputs
